hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|uv.lock|*.lock) echo "BLOCK: refusing to edit $f" >&2; exit 1;; esac; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.egg-info/*|__pycache__/*|*.pyc|.git/*) echo "BLOCK: refusing to edit generated file $f" >&2; exit 1;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in */server.json|*plugin.json|*marketplace.json|*.mcp.json) echo "BLOCK: Version files should be updated via 'uv run poe bump-version <version>' to keep all 4 files in sync." >&2; exit 1;; esac; done
uv run ruff format $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS && uv run ruff check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.json) python -m json.tool "$f" > /dev/null;; *.yml|*.yaml) python -c "import yaml,sys; yaml.safe_load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$f";; esac; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.py) uv run pyright "$f";; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in src/mcp_outline/features/documents/*.py) base=$(basename "$f" .py); test_file="tests/features/documents/test_${base}.py"; [ -f "$test_file" ] && uv run pytest "$test_file" -x -q;; src/mcp_outline/utils/*.py) uv run pytest tests/utils/ -x -q;; esac; done
